title: PM Pilot
content:
How could I miss this one?!? .. Tomorrow, Mr. PM will be on an  "F-16":http://www.voodoo.cz/falcon/  (that's a fighter jet) from Bangkok to Nachornratchasrima (นครราชสีมา).  %(me)ถ้าได้ยินข่าวไม่พลาดนะครับ%  He'll be sitting in as a second pilot.

Many people have expressed their voices against this decision. But you know the PM, once he has his mind set on something - he'll do it.

I just hope that the F-16 will not be engulfed in flame like the TG one. The-Readers still remember, right? :)
